programme.title: Warriors Cup

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Wrestling legend and ESPN veteran Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders. Breaking news, hot takes, exclusive interviews and daily Best bets combine for must-watch sports entertainment.

programme.title: BYB 24: Super Brawl Saturday
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion DJ "Da Protégé" Linderman defends his title against undefeated challenger "Hurricane" Ike Villanueva; Harold "Lightning" McQueen takes on Brandon "Slaughterhouse" Birr in a featherweight championship rematch; from Biloxi, Miss.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Features Tony Nelson vs. Jose Liera in a bare knuckle boxing bout from Nashville, Tenn on June 21, 2025.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Mixed martial arts league where athletes compete in a regular season, postseason and championship.

programme.desc: Cub Hawkins and Ryan Jett fight for the Light Heavyweight Belt; Agnesa Kirakosian battles Shelby Cannon.

programme.title: BKFC 22: Lombard vs. Hunt
programme.desc: Hector Lombard tries to defend the cruiserweight title against Lorenzo Hunt, while Dat Nguyen looks to take the lightweight title from Luis Palomino. From Nov. 19, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: BKFC 24
programme.desc: A championship bout between Lorenzo Hunt and Joe Riggs highlights the card.

programme.title: BKFC 25: Adams vs. Cleckler
programme.desc: Arnold Adams and Dillon Cleckler square up in a full night of bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 26
programme.desc: Featuring Elvin Brito vs. Luis Palomino for BKFC welterweight title and Francesco Ricchi vs. Uly Diaz for interim BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania IV
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 3
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Mike Richman, light heavyweight championship bout. From Feb. 17, 2023 at Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Usman Nurmagomedov vs. Benson Henderson, lightweight world championship; Tofiq Musayev vs. Alexander Shabliy; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Linton Vassell. From March 10, 2023, at SAP Center in San Jose, Calif.

programme.desc: From March 31, 2023, at Pechanga Resort & Casino in Temecula, Calif.
